support.summary: No CEO-irreplaceable action required on Thompson Pipe Group
support.detail: This is a $120k pipeline deal in Formal Evaluation (close 2026-10-01) progressing normally. No blocked discount, roadmap commitment, presales guarantee, or CEO-to-buyer peer relationship is at stake. The recommended escalation is a manager-to-Carolyn re-engagement or CFO introduction, which a VP/RSD can execute.
support.why_not_vp: Every open lever (pricing, business case, CFO intro, champion re-engagement) is routine field execution a rep/RSD or the owner's manager handles; no CEO-only authority or peer relationship is in play.

monitor.reason: Deal is small ($120k, non-forecasted), recently active (6 days), and the sole outstanding deliverable is buyer-dependent; no recent slip, slowdown, or competitor edge within 14 days.
